name: service-oriented-vehicle-diagnostics
description: SOVD diagnostic foundation — local dev runner

scripts.deps: npm install && npm install --prefix Simulator/frontend && npm install --prefix Simulator/renode-bridge
scripts.start: concurrently --names "renode,server,bridge,frontend" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,magenta,green" "npm run start:renode" "npm run start:server" "npm run start:renodebridge" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:doorecu && npm run build:sovdserver && npm run build:frontend
